category_title: Preschoolers with aggressive behaviors and social-emotional regulation difficulties
scenario_title: Small group cooperation and rule adherence
minimal_context: Joshua is participating in a small group building activity where he is expected to share blocks with his peers.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for our small group activity. You and your classmates need to share these building blocks to make a tower together.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Speaking loudly) I am making the tower! I need all the big blocks!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Joshua, you are speaking too loudly right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No! I am not! Give me those blocks right now!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to play nicely and share the materials with the group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Give me the blocks or I will hurt you!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for our small group activity. You and your classmates need to share these building blocks to make a tower together.

STUDENT: (Speaking loudly) I am making the tower! I need all the big blocks!

TUTOR: Joshua, you are speaking too loudly right now.

STUDENT: No! I am not! Give me those blocks right now!

TUTOR: You need to play nicely and share the materials with the group.

STUDENT: Give me the blocks or I will hurt you!

task.content: Small group activities requiring cooperation and sharing

context.materials: Pictures using Boardmaker TM symbols depicting classroom rules
context.time_context: Daily at the beginning of the day and before every large group activity

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Singled out for any small infractions like speaking loudly
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Opposition, and verbal threats to peers

behavior_patterns.condition: When expected to adhere to classroom rules for loud and small voices
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Speaking loudly, expressing anger by aggression, aggressive language and behaviors toward others
